articles.author: Ryan Joe
articles.title: Tim Cook Grew Apple by Reducing Its Ambition
articles.description: There is more to Apple than just being profitable, and you can argue the trajectory that Steve Jobs  created accounts for a lot of Tim Cook’s “success.”
articles.content:
